WritingAboutProjects

Planning BUILDathon

June 26, 2024

$GETFIT

What:

  • $GETFIT is an incentive token to help people lose weight through onchain accountability
  • Team $GETFIT: me and Leal
  • Benchmark: GitHub commit streaks
  • We will be submitting to categories Farcaster Social track as well as Coinbase Onchain Verifications

User Journey:

  1. Leal wakes up
  2. Leal goes on top of his Withings and weights himself
  3. Leal starts a streak on Farcaster /fitness channel
  4. Leal automatically inputs his Withings info into get-fit frame
  5. Leal casts his weight results with hashtag #getfit to keep up with his streak
  6. Automatic entry in GetFit round on rounds.wtf
  7. Distribute $GETFIT token

Tech to Use:

  • Attestation:
  • API Withings: https://developer.withings.com/api-reference
  • Frame creation: https://dev.neynar.com/frames/create
  • Token incentives:
  • Rounds: https://rounds.wtf
  • Party app: https://www.party.app

Detailed Planning:

Friday AM:

  • Purchase domain
  • Create landing page using Vercel
  • Assess if worth purchasing paid version of Claude
  • Assess if ChatGPT is OK for image generation or if we need Midjourney
  • Launch party.app

Saturday PM:

  • Create frame using Neynar
  • Connect frame with Withings API

Sunday PM:

  • Close party
  • Setup Rounds.wtf
  • Test everything and deliver on Devfolio
